name: Twilio (SMS)
description: Talk to this agent over SMS through Twilio — inbound signature verification and outbound replies via eve's twilioChannel, with the allowed sender and from-number read from env.
setup:
1. In the **Twilio Console**, copy your Account SID and Auth Token into `TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID` and `TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN`.
2. Set `TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER` to a Twilio number you own (E.164, e.g. `+15557654321`) and `TWILIO_ALLOW_FROM` to the number(s) allowed to reach the agent.
3. Deploy the agent, then on your Twilio number point the **Messaging** webhook at `POST https://<your-domain>/e/<environmentId>/eve/v1/twilio/messages`. (Voice is also available at `/eve/v1/twilio/voice` if you want it.)

Use the exact public URL Twilio will call — eve verifies the `X-Twilio-Signature` against it. Sending SMS is subject to consent, opt-out, and recording laws in your region; make sure your use complies.

secrets.name: TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID
secrets.description: Twilio account SID — identifies the account for outbound SMS.

secrets.name: TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN
secrets.description: Twilio auth token — eve uses it to verify the X-Twilio-Signature on inbound requests.

secrets.name: TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER
secrets.description: The Twilio number the agent sends from, in E.164 format (e.g. +15557654321).

secrets.name: TWILIO_ALLOW_FROM
secrets.description: The phone number(s) allowed to message the agent, in E.164 format. Messages from anyone else are ignored.
